data.title: Juicy Lucy Expands to More Markets and Retailers; Brings Cheesy Goodness to Freezers Just in Time for Grilling Season
data.description: In Los Angeles, as Spring ushers in grill season in the Sun Belt, the iconic Juicy Lucy burger is making its way to retailer freezers just in time. Originating in Minneapolis bars in the 1950s, the Juicy Lucy has garnered fame for its unique cheese-stuffed patty. Juicy Lucy, Inc, based in LA, launched the frozen cheese-stuffed burger patties in 2025 at specific Target stores in the Upper Midwest. Now, consumers nationwide can enjoy this Midwestern delicacy as it expands to more locations.

data.title: Bitcoin's potential exceeds $30T+ gold market, new analysis reveals, driven by global unrest & financial pressure.
data.description: Recent analysis of Bitcoin on a macro level reveals that its potential market size has exceeded the $38 trillion market capitalization of gold. This surge is attributed to ongoing geopolitical unrest and the imposition of financial sanctions globally.

data.title: Senator Warren grills Musk on X funds. She scrutinizes stablecoins issued by private firms, questioning their credibility.
data.description: The Democrat from Massachusetts has expressed concerns about private companies, such as non-bank entities, creating stablecoins pegged to the dollar.
What's Going On With L3Harris Stock Wednesday?

data.title: Monjur Appoints Tracy Thibodeau as Vice President of Product & AI
data.description: Dallas-based company Monjur, Inc. has appointed Tracy Thibodeau as the Vice President of Product & AI. Monjur is a prominent provider of attorney-monitored contract intelligence solutions for Managed Service Providers (MSPs). Thibodeau will oversee the product strategy and AI ventures, driving advancements within the legal technology platform, notably the AI-driven assistant Monjur Pilot. With almost twenty years of experience, Thibodeau's role will focus on enhancing innovation within the company.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. informs on the changes to proposals 5 and 9 of the AGM
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has reported alterations to proposals 5 and 9 for the Annual General Meeting of 2026. Proposal 5 now includes the annex, while Proposal 9 has been modified in terms of the CV. The bank has provided this information regarding the upcoming AGM, with the adjustments made to these particular agenda items.

data.title: Reverie Active Adult by Dream Finders Homes Celebrates Grand Opening of Reverie at Parkhaven in Hermitage
data.description: In Hermitage, Tennessee, the grand opening of Reverie at Parkhaven, a new 55+ community by Dream Finders Homes, was celebrated recently. The event, which took place on March 13th, marked the official launch of the community just outside Nashville. Residents of the active adult community can enjoy various amenities and activities catered to their age group.

data.title: Deoleo Achieves 2030 Recycled Plastic Target Five Years Early
data.description: Dallas, April 15, 2026 - Deoleo, the leading olive oil company globally, has released its 2025 Sustainability Report which details the key advancements in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) aspects made in the past fiscal year. As the world's top olive oil provider, the firm showcases its growth and commitment to sustainability through this report.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Pumps Higher Amid Trump Comments; Fed Report Looms (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the stock market saw fluctuating trade as the Dow Jones index reacted to President Donald Trump's statements regarding U.S.-Iran peace talks. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq index showed growth amidst the uncertainty. Investors are also anticipating the release of a Federal Reserve report. Stay updated with live coverage on this developing situation.

data.title: Imperial Dade Canada Enters into a Definitive Agreement to Acquire Enterprise Paper
data.description: Imperial Dade, a distributor of food service packaging and janitorial supplies, has announced the acquisition of Enterprise Paper Holdings, Ltd. The deal involves a private transaction, with financial details remaining undisclosed. Established in 1973, Enterprise Paper is a Canadian-owned company specializing in paper, packaging, and janitorial products. The company has operations in British Columbia and Alberta. The transaction marks a significant development for Imperial Dade in expanding its presence in Canada.

data.title: ELRON VENTURES PORTFOLIO COMPANY ZENGO TO BE ACQUIRED BY ETORO
data.description: A recent transaction in Tel Aviv on April 15, 2026, marks the increasing merging of self-custody services, digital asset infrastructure, and multi-asset platforms. Elron Ventures Ltd. (TASE: ELRN), a tech investment company specializing in nurturing and expanding various ventures, made significant moves in this direction. This transaction signifies the growing alignment of these sectors, emphasizing the importance of digital asset management.
